---
title: "BirdNET Analysis"
author: "`r Sys.info()[['user']]`"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

Analysing PAM datasets analysed using BirdNET-Analyzer
___

## Setup

Load libraries

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE,results='hide'}
library(NocMigR2)
library(MonitoR)
library(magrittr)
library(tidyverse)
```

Customise variables and meta information:

```{r, warning=FALSE}
## define path to data files
path = "D:/BirdNET/path2recordings"
## Load AudioMoth configuration (CONFIG.txt)
am_config = TRUE
## Select input directory (recurisve)
recursive =  TRUE
## Create hyperlink to extracted events?
hyperlink = TRUE
## Create spectra for extracted events?
spectro = FALSE
## Set meta data
meta_data <- BirdNET_meta(
  ## Location details
  Location = NA,
  Lat = NA,
  Lon = NA,
  ## Device details
  Device = "AudioMoth", # c('AudioMoth, 'SM')
  Micro = NA,
  ## BirdNet params
  Min_conf = 0.7,
  Overlap = 0,
  Sensitivity = 1.25,
  Slist = "BirdNET_V2.4")

## Archive information
path2archive = "~/PAM/Records/"
db = "~/PAM/db.xlsx"
keep.false = FALSE
png = FALSE
```

## Rename files to datetime

```{r, eval=T}
strip_device_id(input_dir = path)
```


## Format `BirdNET` results

```{r, eval=F, warning=FALSE}
data <- lapply(path, 
               BirdNET, 
               am_config = am_config, 
               recursive =  recursive,
               meta = meta_data)
```

## Extract `BirdNET` results

```{r, eval=F, warning=FALSE}
data <- lapply(path, BirdNET_extract, hyperlink = hyperlink, spectro = spectro)
```

## Archive Results

```{r, eval=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
out <- BirdNET_archive_am(
  BirdNET_results = file.path(path, 'BirdNET.xlsx'),
  path2archive = path2archive,
  keep.false = keep.false,
  db = db,
  png = png)
```
